feedback: The work advances the daily credit refresh automation and integrates Manus session handling, but it stops short of a production‑ready implementation. Core functionality is introduced, yet critical safeguards, testing, and integration polish are missing.
issues: No unit or integration tests added for the new cron job or dispatch command changes.
The generated script lacks robust error handling and logging; failures could silently go unnoticed.
